title: dir idea
description: YAML frontmatter for an idea file under ideas/. The Markdown body below the frontmatter holds the human-readable spec.

id.description: Stable slug, prefixed with a zero-padded number. Matches the filename without extension.

status.description: Lifecycle status. draft/open/exists/superseded are curation-set; claimed/building/shipped are driven by on-chain state.

summary.description: One- to two-sentence pitch shown in the catalog list.

ckb_properties.description: Which CKB primitives the idea exploits.

primitives.description: Building blocks a builder will need (e.g. xUDT, JoyID, CCC, Fiber node, ckb-js-vm).

author.description: Idea author for attribution (handle or identity). Mirrors the on-chain `author` attestation.

references.description: Links: forum threads, docs, prior art.

forkable_starter.description: Optional URL to a degit-able scaffold repo that gets a builder running locally fast.

acceptance_criteria.description: Checklist defining 'done'. This IS the bounty release condition — its hash is pinned into the escrow Cell. Write it concretely and verifiably.

needs_collaborators.description: Roles a claimant is looking for, for team-formation.

supersedes.description: id of an idea this one replaces.

superseded_by.description: id of the idea that replaces this one (set when status = superseded).

exists_as.description: When status = exists: links to the live project(s) that already cover this.

shipped_projects.description: When status = shipped: projects built from this idea, linking the loop closed.
